task_completion.description: Verify that tax rates and calculations are enabled in WooCommerce settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WooCommerce Settings -> General tab, the checkbox for 'Enable tax rates and calculations' should be checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the California tax rate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce Settings -> Tax -> Standard rates, there should be a row with State code 'CA', Rate '8.25', Tax name 'CA Sales Tax', and Priority '1'. Zip/Postcode and City should be left blank or marked with an asterisk (*) for all.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'California' shipping zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce Settings -> Shipping -> Shipping zones, there should be a zone named 'California' with the region set to 'California, United States'.

task_completion.description: Verify the shipping method and cost for the California zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'California' shipping zone settings, there should be a 'Flat rate' shipping method added. The settings modal or summary for this method should show a cost of '7.99'.

task_completion.description: Verify the manual order creation with the correct customer and billing state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Edit Order page, the customer should be set to Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com). The Billing details section must show the State/County as 'California' or 'CA'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct products and quantities are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the order items list, there should be two items: 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' with a quantity of 2 (Cost/Total reflecting x2), and 'Bamboo Cutting Board Set' with a quantity of 1.

task_completion.description: Verify the private order note and order status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Order Notes sidebar, there should be a private note reading 'Priority fulfillment - customer loyalty reward' (typically indicated by a grey background or 'Private note' label). The Order status dropdown at the top of the page should be set to 'Processing'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal using WP-CLI or curl commands to configure settings or create the order.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the actual WooCommerce interface with forms being filled out and saved, rather than just a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of MySQL terminals, phpMyAdmin, or database scripts being used to insert the order or settings directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Tax Configuration: Rate must be exactly 8.25%, State 'CA', Name 'CA Sales Tax'. Shipping Configuration: Zone name 'California', Method 'Flat rate', Cost $7.99. Order Details: Customer is Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com), Billing state is 'CA'. Products: 2x Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU: OCT-BLK-M), 1x Bamboo Cutting Board Set (SKU: BCB-SET2). Order Note: 'Priority fulfillment - customer loyalty reward' (must be a private note). Order Status: 'Processing'.
